pages.title: Server Rack
pages.text: The heavy lifter of the LogiCore network. While the $(l:logicore:machines/computer)Computer$() is suitable for small tasks, the Server Rack is designed for high-density parallel processing, generating significantly more $(l:logicore:architecture/cycles)Cycles$() per tick.

pages.title: Configuration
pages.text: The Server Rack accepts up to 9 $(l:logicore:machines/server)Servers$() in its hot-swappable bays. Each Server must be populated with $(l:logicore:components/processor_units)Processor Units$() before insertion.$(br)$(br)Right-click the rack with a Server to insert it. Right-click the rack empty-handed to open its GUI, where Servers can be managed manually. The rack requires a connection to the network via $(l:logicore:components/data_cable)Data Cable$().$(br)$(br)Due to its high throughput, ensure your power generation can sustain its energy demands.

pages.title: Datacenter Boost
pages.text: When placed inside a formed $(l:logicore:architecture/datacenter)Datacenter$() multiblock structure, the Server Rack receives a significant boost to cycle production. The enclosed environment optimizes cooling and power delivery for peak performance.
An industrial-grade housing unit designed for maximum airflow and component density.
